auth.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Check your email or password.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

device.title: Device Management
device.receiveDataHelp: Turning this off pauses new data reception. Historical data is retained.
device.archivedReceiveHelp: Unarchive the device before receiving data.
device.archiveConfirmDescription: Archiving stops data reception and hides the device from the current device list. Historical data is retained.
device.unarchiveConfirmDescription: After unarchiving, the device returns to the current list and resumes data reception.

exhibition.title: Exhibitions & Climate Points
exhibition.name: Exhibition name
exhibition.preservationGoalHelp: Record preservation and climate-control requirements for the exhibition or object group, such as RH range, temperature range, special showcase needs, alerts, monthly reports, and handover context.
exhibition.preservationGoalPlaceholder: Example: RH 50-60%, temperature 20-24 C; sensitive showcases need daily review, anomalies in monthly reports, and deinstallation handover notes.
exhibition.preservationGoalEmpty: No preservation goal has been entered.
exhibition.unitNamePlaceholder: Example: Entrance unit, loan-object area, showcase group 1
exhibition.unitDescriptionHelp: Describe this unit's location, object or showcase scope, climate-control notes, and handover context.
exhibition.unitDescriptionPlaceholder: Example: This unit includes the entrance showcase group and two ambient points; watch humidity changes from visitor flow.

floorPlan.mobileReadOnlyHelp: Mobile floor plan is read-only for field checks. Use a tablet or desktop to edit coordinates.
floorPlan.tabletPortraitHelp: Tablet portrait focuses on point inspection. Rotate to landscape or use desktop to adjust callout positions.
floorPlan.rotateForFloorPlan: Rotate your phone to inspect the floor plan.
floorPlan.pointNamePlaceholder: Example: Showcase A-03, entrance ambient point, loan-object center
floorPlan.pointHelp: Enter a field-recognizable point name; bind a device, unit, and threshold when needed.
floorPlan.selectFloorPlanFirst: Select or create a floor plan before uploading the PDF
floorPlan.noFloorPlan: No floor plan has been created
floorPlan.noPoints: No points have been created for this floor plan
floorPlan.setActiveVersionConfirmTitle: Set this as the active version?
floorPlan.setActiveVersionConfirmDescription: This changes the floor plan version used for operational context.
floorPlan.noBoundDeviceTrend: This point is not bound to a device, so no 24-hour trend can be shown.
floorPlan.noTrendData: This device has no measurements in the latest 24 hours.

report.title: Charts & Reports
report.queryReady: Select a device, then search to generate the trend chart
report.largeQueryHint: This query spans many devices or a long period. Loading and export may take longer.
report.queryFailed: The report query failed. Check the filters or try again later.
report.noData: No measurements match the selected filters.
report.noDataHint: The device may be offline, the range may be too narrow, the data profile may not match, or the filters may be too restrictive.
report.partialDataHint: The result includes offline, no-data, or low-coverage devices. Confirm it is suitable before using it as operational evidence.
report.chartNotReady: The chart has not finished rendering. Try exporting the PDF again shortly.

exportDisabled.noPermission: This account does not have export permission.
exportDisabled.notReady: No report query is ready yet.
exportDisabled.queryFailed: The latest query failed, so export is unavailable.
exportDisabled.noData: There is no data to export.

alert.title: Alert Center
alert.silenceConfirmDescription: Silencing suppresses operational warnings for this alert for 60 minutes.
alert.offlineDetail: {device} has not returned measurements for more than {cutoffMinutes} minutes.

weather.title: External Weather
weather.missingApiKey: CWA Open Data authorization code is missing

authz.forbiddenMessage: Your account does not currently have permission to access this feature or perform this action.
authz.forbiddenToast: You do not have permission to perform this action

Viewer.label: Viewer
Viewer.description: Read-only monitoring for dashboards, devices, exhibitions, alerts, and report queries.

Operator.label: Operator
Operator.description: Viewer plus report export and alert acknowledgement or silence.

Manager.label: Manager
Manager.description: Operator plus exhibition, floor-plan, and threshold management.

Admin.label: Administrator
Admin.description: Operational administration for devices, notifications, users, system settings, audit, and ingest.

SuperAdmin.label: Super administrator
SuperAdmin.description: Full system owner, including compensation, derived data, and dangerous delete.

dashboard:read.label: Read dashboard
dashboard:read.description: View live monitoring overview and trends.

reports:read.label: Query reports
reports:read.description: Query charts and measurement report data.

reports:export.label: Export reports
reports:export.description: Export reports, create report jobs, or generate monthly reports.

alerts:read.label: Read alerts
alerts:read.description: View alert lists and alert status.

alerts:ack.label: Handle alerts
alerts:ack.description: Acknowledge alerts or create silence windows.

devices:read.label: Read devices
devices:read.description: View device lists, status, and latest measurements.

devices:manage.label: Manage devices
devices:manage.description: Create, edit, archive, replace, calibrate, and maintain devices.

exhibitions:read.label: Read exhibitions
exhibitions:read.description: View exhibitions, zones, and preservation context.

exhibitions:manage.label: Manage exhibitions
exhibitions:manage.description: Create, edit, and archive exhibitions and zones.

floorplans:read.label: Read floor plans
floorplans:read.description: View floor plans, versions, and climate points.

floorplans:manage.label: Manage floor plans
floorplans:manage.description: Create, upload, configure, and archive floor plans and points.

thresholds:manage.label: Manage thresholds
thresholds:manage.description: Configure threshold profiles and assignment rules.

notifications:manage.label: Manage notifications
notifications:manage.description: Configure notification channels and send test notifications.

users:manage.label: Manage users and roles
users:manage.description: Create and edit users, roles, and permissions.

system:manage.label: Manage system
system:manage.description: Manage system settings, data profile, retention policies, and backup jobs.

dangerous:delete.label: Dangerous delete
dangerous:delete.description: Run irreversible delete operations such as user and role deletion.

ingest:write.label: Import data
ingest:write.description: Import measurement data or external collector data.
